'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 3''' was published in December [[1977]] by [[Paradise Press]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]—Rogue [[Spacer/Legends|Spacer]]!", by [[John May]]: an extended profile of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]].
*"Robotics: From [[R2-D2/Legends|Artoo]] to Quasars", by [[Michael Marten|Dr. M. F. Marten]]: a discussion of the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] of ''[[Star Wars]]'' in comparison to the state-of-the-art robots of 1977.
*An interview with [[John Stears]], the mechanical effects supervisor for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|the original ''Star Wars'' film]], by [[Jon Trux]].

==Media==
===Poster gallery===
*[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] in [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] control room
